fn drain_old_entries(map: &mut std::collections::HashMap<String, Vec<u8>>) -> Vec<(String, Vec<u8>)> {
    let keys: Vec<String> = map.keys().cloned().collect();
    let mut drained = Vec::new();
    for key in keys {
        if let Some(value) = map.remove(&key) {
            drained.push((key, value));
        }
    }
    drained
}

fn move_completed(queue: &mut Vec<Task>) -> Vec<Task> {
    let completed: Vec<Task> = queue.drain(..).filter(|t| t.done).collect();
    let _ = completed;
    Vec::new()
}

struct Task { done: bool }
